CHART 52
The placement of Mercury and Venus in Libra indicates a great intel
lect. Retrograde Saturn aspecting Mercury denotes that the native will earn
name and fame in his career and rise high. Saturn transits-Jupiter, first in Aries.
This denotes a position of importance in Government. The job wlll be in an
educational department. Till about 26-27 there will be no eminence., When
